A '''dwarf star''' was artificially '''collapsed''' by [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Arakkus]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. He achieved this by utilizing a [[negatron impact charge]] on the dwarf star. When the star began to collapse, its behavior become similar to that of a [[Black hole/Legends|black hole]], sucking in all surrounding space.

{{Star-stub}}
